jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - NHPC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
